days.title: Arrival in Paro
days.desc: Fly into Paro over the Himalayas, meet your guide, and visit Rinpung Dzong and the National Museum before checking into your hotel.

days.title: Hike to Tiger's Nest Monastery
days.desc: A 4-5 hour round-trip hike to Taktsang Palphug, Bhutan's most iconic monastery, clinging to a cliff 900m above the valley.

days.title: Drive to Thimphu
days.desc: Visit the Buddha Dordenma statue, Tashichho Dzong, and the weekend market, then explore the capital's handicraft shops.

days.title: Dochula Pass & Punakha
days.desc: Cross Dochula Pass (108 chortens, Himalayan views) en route to Punakha Dzong and the longest suspension bridge in Bhutan.

days.title: Departure
days.desc: Transfer back to Paro International Airport for your onward flight.

days.title: Arrival in Paro
days.desc: Scenic Himalayan flight into Paro, welcome by your guide, and an easy afternoon visiting Kyichu Lhakhang temple.

days.title: Tiger's Nest Monastery
days.desc: Full-day hike to Taktsang Monastery with a rest stop at the halfway cafeteria overlooking the cliff.

days.title: Thimphu City Tour
days.desc: Buddha Dordenma, Tashichho Dzong, the National Memorial Chorten, and the takin (national animal) preserve.

days.title: Thimphu to Punakha via Dochula Pass
days.desc: Stop at the 108-chorten pass before descending to Punakha Dzong and its riverside setting.

days.title: Punakha to Phobjikha Valley
days.desc: Drive over Lawala Pass into the glacial Phobjikha Valley, home to the rare black-necked crane.

days.title: Phobjikha to Bumthang
days.desc: Continue east to Bumthang, Bhutan's spiritual heartland, visiting Jambay Lhakhang along the way.

days.title: Bumthang Temple Circuit
days.desc: Explore Kurjey Lhakhang, Tamshing Monastery, and a local farmhouse for lunch and butter tea.

days.title: Fly out from Bumthang or Paro
days.desc: Departure transfer to the airport, ending your circuit of central and western Bhutan.

days.title: Arrival & Trek Briefing in Paro
days.desc: Gear check, permit processing, and an early night before the trek begins.

days.title: Paro to Jele Dzong
days.desc: Start the trek climbing through forest to Jele Dzong at 3,400m, your first camp with views back over Paro valley.

days.title: Jele Dzong to Jangchulakha
days.desc: A ridge walk through rhododendron forest with views of Mt. Jomolhari on clear days.

days.title: Jangchulakha to Jimilangtsho Lake
days.desc: Trek past yak herder camps to camp beside Jimilangtsho, one of the trek's scenic alpine lakes.

days.title: Jimilangtsho to Simkotra Lake
days.desc: A shorter, higher-altitude day camping beside Simkotra Lake at around 4,100m.

days.title: Simkotra to Phajoding to Thimphu
days.desc: Descend past Phajoding Monastery into Thimphu, trading the tent for a hotel bed.

days.title: Departure
days.desc: Morning at leisure in Thimphu before your transfer to Paro International Airport.
